# ABB — 800V DC Products for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## SACE Infinitus — Solid-State DC Circuit Breaker
- First IEC-certified solid-state DC circuit breaker for data centers
- Rated up to 1000V DC (covers 800V bus)
- Microsecond fault interruption (vs milliseconds for mechanical)
- Zero arc flash hazard
- Bidirectional current flow (supports solar-direct + battery)
- Modular, scalable design
- Digital connectivity — ABB Ability platform
- Status: Production units 2025-2026
- Pricing: Enterprise/project — premium over mechanical

## HiPerGuard — Medium Voltage UPS (KEY PRODUCT)
- **Input voltage:** Up to 24 kV (medium voltage)
- **Capacity:** 2,250 kVA per unit, up to 10 units in parallel = **22.5 MVA total**
- **Efficiency:** 98%
- **Technology:** IGBT-based Power Electronic Building Blocks (PEBBs), 18 x 250 kVA each
- **Maintenance interval:** 10 years
- **Role:** MV-level UPS — sits between utility grid and facility distribution
- **ADC use:** Grid → HiPerGuard → Eaton Beam Rubin DSX → racks
- Product page: new.abb.com/ups/systems/medium-voltage-ups/hiperguard

## SACE Emax 3 — AI-Ready LV Switchgear (Oct 2025)
- IEC 62443 SL2 cybersecurity certified
- Real-time load/voltage/temperature sensing
- Predictive maintenance built in
- Arc flash protection integrated
- Pairs with MNS switchgear platform
- Launched: Data Center World Asia, October 2025

## Other ABB 800V DC Products
- MNS LV Switchgear — refreshed platform with Emax 3 integration; 800V DC variant targeted 2027
- SACE Emax 2 DC — air circuit breakers up to 1000V DC
- SACE Tmax XT DC — molded-case breakers for DC
- Hi-Trac DC contactors
- ABB Ability Data Center Automation — integrated BMS/EPMS/DCIM platform
- Prefab 800V DC rectifiers/busbars/skids — in development with NVIDIA, targeted 2027

## ABB + NVIDIA Partnership
- **Formal bilateral R&D agreement announced October 13, 2025**
- Named partner on NVIDIA's official 800 VDC architecture page (Data Center Power Systems tier)
- Joint work: MV UPS + DC distribution + solid-state electronics for 1 MW racks at gigawatt campuses
- NVIDIA counterpart: Dion Harris, Sr. Director HPC/Cloud/AI Infrastructure
- Joint white paper: "Redefining Power Infrastructure for AI: The Role of 800 VDC in Data Centers"
- Paolo Catapane (ABB) co-chairs OCP Power Distribution Sub-Project alongside JP Buzzell (Eaton)

## Key Contacts
- **Giampiero Frisio** — President, ABB Electrification (executive sponsor)
- **Paolo Catapane** — OCP Power Distribution Sub-Project co-chair (technical/standards lead)
- US electrification: electrification.us.abb.com
